
$$
\underbrace{\pi}_{\Pr(Y=1)}
\overbrace{
\underbrace{
\underset{
\xleftarrow[\frac{\odds}{1+\odds}]{}
}
{
\xrightarrow{\frac{\pi}{1-\pi}}
}
\underbrace{\odds}_{\oddst(Y=1)}
\underset{
\xleftarrow[\exp{\logodds}]{}
}
{
\xrightarrow{\logf{\odds}}
}
}_{\expitf{\logodds}}
}^{\logitf{\pi}}
\underbrace{\logodds}_{\text{log-odds}(Y=1)}
$$
